title: Devops & Operations Engineer
description:
We’re looking for an engineer who thrives in production environments, understands that reliability is a feature, and enjoys taking ownership of systems end-to-end. You will play a key role in ensuring our platform is secure, scalable, and resilient. While continuously improving how we deploy, monitor, and operate it.
   

  

 If you’re excited about combining cloud-native infrastructure, Kubernetes, and hands-on production operations, and want to work in a modern, AI-augmented engineering environment, this role is for you.
   

  

****About Mitigram****
 Mitigram is the leading digital platform for global trade financing. It is on a journey to build the largest and most comprehensive trade finance network, leveraging data to enable insights and accelerate the digitalisation of global trade and trade finance.
   

  

 As a growing company with a collaborative, innovative team, we offer an exciting opportunity to make a tangible impact on cutting-edge projects. Join us as we shape the future of Trade Finance!
   

  

****Why You’ll Love This Role****
 You won’t just maintain infrastructure, you will evolve it.
   

  

 In this role, you will help build and evolve the infrastructure that powers our platform. You will work hands-on with Azure cloud environments, Kubernetes clusters, and CI/CD pipelines to ensure our systems are secure, scalable, and reliable. The role also involves strengthening monitoring, logging, and operational processes to improve uptime and resilience.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with developers to build observable and scalable production systems that support global financial workflows. We also integrate AI tools into our engineering workflows as a productivity multiplier, using them to improve automation, diagnostics, and how we operate our systems.
   

  

****Our Tech Stack****
* Microsoft Azure (cloud infrastructure & services)
* Kubernetes (AKS)
* Helm
* Linux-based systems
* Git-based workflows
* CI/CD pipelines
* Monitoring, logging & alerting systems
* Secure networking & cloud architecture


****What You’ll Bring To Succeed****
****Must Have****
* Strong experience managing Azure cloud infrastructure
* Hands-on experience running and operating Kubernetes in production
* Solid knowledge of Linux systems administration
* Experience with Helm and Kubernetes packaging/deployments
* Strong understanding of networking (VPCs, firewalls, DNS, routing, load balancing — practical experience, not just theory)
* Comfortable working with Git and CI/CD workflows
* Experience operating and maintaining systems in production environments
* Understanding of reliability, monitoring, incident handling, and operational risk


****Nice to Have****
* Infrastructure as Code experience (e.g., Terraform, Bicep)
* Experience with security hardening and compliance in regulated environments
* Observability tooling experience
* Experience in fintech or other high-availability domains
* Automation and scripting skills (e.g., Bash, Python)


****The Mindset We’re Looking For****
 We value engineers who are curious and eager to understand systems at a deeper level. You are humble, open to learning, and welcome feedback as part of continuous improvement. You take initiative, work proactively, and naturally collaborate with others across teams. At the same time, you take ownership of the systems you work with, are aware of risks and operational trade-offs, and bring a broad technical perspective with strong systems thinking.
   

  

 You’ll join a team that values technical excellence, clean architecture, and pragmatic engineering. Together, we’re building and operating critical infrastructure for Mitigram’s global trade platform, work that matters, done right.
   

  

****Our Engineering & Operations Culture****
* Production-First Thinking – reliability & security are built in, not added later
* Automation Over Manual Work – if it’s repeated twice, we automate it
* Shared Responsibility – Dev & Ops collaborate closely
* Continuous Improvement – we learn from incidents and evolve
* AI Integration – we use intelligent tools to move faster and operate smarter


****What happens next?****
 If you believe this position aligns with your skills and career goals, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We will review applications on a rolling basis.
   

  

 At Mitigram, we’re open and curious, so if you are not entirely confident you meet our exact criteria, apply anyway —we value many other qualities as well. We're committed to building an inclusive and diverse team. We welcome applications from developers of all backgrounds who share our passion for technical excellence and innovation.
   

  

****Reference and Background Checks****
 As part of the recruitment process, we will ask the final candidate for references and conduct a background check.

title: Strategic Account Director
description:
Mercury Systems is looking for a new talent to join its EMEA team.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 A global leader in advanced technology solutions for aerospace and defence customers a seeking Strategic Account Directors to drive high-impact growth across the Nordics. This is a newly created, senior-level role designed to strengthen in-country customer engagement, accelerate business with leading defence primes, and support a major commercial transformation across the region.
 



  





 Reporting into the commercial leadership structure, the successful candidate will play a critical role in shaping regional business development, influencing strategic bids, and expanding long-term customer relationships.
 



  





 This is a rare opportunity to join a high-performing team at the heart of Europe’s defence technology ecosystem, focused on national security, innovation, and cutting-edge electronic systems.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Own the strategic growth agenda across a defined European territory
* Engage at C-Level within leading defense primes and key government stakeholders to identify, influence and secure major business opportunities.
* Hunt and develop net new opportunities aligned to regional and global priorities – this is not a farming role.
* Work closely with cross-functional teams (engineering, program management, operations) to shape bespoke customer solutions and win complex, high-value bids.
* Develop strategic account plans, pipeline, and pursuit strategies across both short- and long-cycle sales opportunities.
* Be an internal voice of the customer – informing go-to-market strategy, product positioning, and regional priorities.
* Navigate complex procurement frameworks, offset requirements, and compliance protocols to unlock regional growth.



  





**Education & Experience** 



* Proven success in business development, strategic account, or sales leadership role within the defense, aerospace or high-reliability technology sector.
* Deep relationships with one or more major European defense primes (e.g., Airbus, Thales, Saab, Rheinmetall, Leonardo, Indra, BAE, Kongsberg, etc.).
* Fluent in English; additional fluency in French, and Swedish highly desirable.
* Strong understanding of aerospace/defense procurement, national security priorities, and technology innovation within mission-critical systems.
* Able to operate autonomously, while integrating into a global matrixed environment.
* Gravitas and credibility represent a complex technology offering at senior military, governmental and industry levels.
* A “hunter” mindset – self-motivated, resilient, and energised by building something new.
* Travel is expected to be on customer sites, internal strategy meetings, and industry events.



  





**Why should you join us?** 




 Mercury Systems is dedicated to
 **advancing aerospace and defense technology** 
 to make the world
 **safer and more secure** 
 . Our mission is to bring
 **cutting-edge commercial technologies** 
 to the
 **tactical edge** 
 , enabling our customers to
 **accelerate innovation** 
 and gain
 **decision superiority** 
 .
 



  





**Our culture** 




 At Mercury, we foster a
 **collaborative, transparent, and supportive work environment** 
 that encourages
 **continuous learning, professional growth, and open communication** 
 . We value communication and transparency and strive to foster two-way dialogue at all levels of the organization. We are committed to lifelong learning, offering comprehensive skills training and tuition reimbursement. Whether you're just starting out on your career journey or you are an experienced professional, it's important to us that you feel recognized and rewarded for your contributions.
 



  





**Details of the mission** 




 Occupancy 100%
 



 Beginning of the activity ASAP
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




 At Mercury Computer Systems, we are committed to fostering a culture of inclusivity and diversity. We believe that equal opportunity is fundamental to building a dynamic and innovative workforce.
 



 We provide employment opportunities free from discrimination, ensuring fair treatment for all individuals regardless of race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, marital status, veteran status, or any other legally protected characteristic.
 



  





 Our commitment extends beyond compliance—we actively promote diversity and inclusivity in our hiring practices, workplace policies, and career development opportunities. We aim to create an environment where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute their unique talents to Mercury Computer Systems' success.
 



  





 Together, we strive to achieve equal opportunities for all while building a collaborative and supportive workplace.
 



  





 Only candidates selected for an interview will be contacted, thank you in advance for your understanding.

title: Quality Assurance Engineer
description:
At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.
   

  

 Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.
   

  

 Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
   

  

*Vi vill förstärka vårt team med ytterligare en Quality Assurance Engineer. I den här rollen får du arbeta med kvalitetssäkring av våra TV-tjänster och set-top-boxar – produkter som används av hundratusentals kunder varje dag.*
*Rollen passar dig som är i början av din karriär inom QA eller mjukvarutestning och som vill utvecklas inom testautomation, teknisk analys och felsökning i en miljö där hårdvara, mjukvara och nätverk möts.*
*Hos oss får du möjlighet att lära dig av erfarna kollegor och gradvis ta ett större ansvar i takt med att din kompetens växer.*
**DCT**
 Är du redo att stå i framkant av den digitala innovationen? Välkommen till vårt team på Tele2, där Digital Capabilities & Technology (DCT) är motorn bakom våra digitala produkter och tjänster.
   

  

 Inom DCT arbetar vi med allt från nätverksplattformar och IT-system till avancerad analys, AI och kundnära digitala tjänster. Vår uppgift är att säkerställa stabila, skalbara och högkvalitativa lösningar för både konsumenter och företag.
   

  

 TV-området är ett av Tele2s viktigaste produkterbjudanden och ställer höga krav på kvalitet, stabilitet och användarupplevelse. Här spelar QA en avgörande roll.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som QA Engineer hos oss arbetar du nära utvecklare, produktägare och externa leverantörer för att säkerställa kvaliteten i våra TV-tjänster och set-top-boxar.
   

  

 Våra lösningar bygger på Android-baserade set-top-boxar, streamingtjänster och backend-system som tillsammans levererar en stabil och högkvalitativ TV-upplevelse.
   

  

 I rollen kombinerar du praktisk testning med teknisk analys för att förstå och lösa problem i system som spänner över både mjukvara, hårdvara och nätverk.
   

  

*Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:*
* Planera, genomföra och rapportera testresultat för TV-tjänster och set-top-boxar
* Identifiera, analysera och följa upp buggar och kvalitetsproblem
* Arbeta tillsammans med utvecklare för att förstå och lösa problem samt förbättra stabilitet och prestanda
* Analysera loggar, systembeteenden och nätverkstrafik för att hitta rotorsaker till problem
* Bidra till utvecklingen av våra testprocesser, testverktyg och arbetssätt inom kvalitetssäkring
* Samverka med externa leverantörer kring kvalitet och leveranser


**Vem är du?**
 Vi tror att du är en person som tycker om att förstå hur tekniska system fungerar och som motiveras av att hitta orsaken till problem.
   

  

 Du arbetar strukturerat, är nyfiken och trivs i ett team där samarbete och kunskapsdelning är en naturlig del av vardagen.
   

  

*För att trivas och lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har:*
* Utbildning inom datateknik, systemvetenskap, programmering eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Ett stort teknikintresse och vilja att förstå hur system fungerar
* Förståelse för IP-baserade nätverk
* Erfarenhet av grundläggande mjukvarutestning eller programmering från studier, projekt eller arbete
* God förmåga att kommunicera på svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


*Meriterande*
 Det är ett plus om du har erfarenhet av exempelvis:
   

  

* Programmering i Python, JavaScript, Java eller C/C++
* Testautomation
* Analysverktyg som ElasticSearch, Wireshark eller liknande
* Testning av Android-baserade enheter eller streamingtjänster


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Senior Engineering Manager
description:
**Craft:**
**Job Description:**
**Senior Engineering Manager | Game Production – Infrastructure**
**Your role within our Kingdom**
 We are looking for a
 **Senior Engineering Manager** 
 to lead our
 **Infrastructure / Developer’s Platform** 
 group within Game Production. This organization provides the platforms and services that hundreds of King developers rely on every day to build, test, ship, and operate games at scale for hundreds of millions of players around the world.
   

  

 You will be combining strong people leadership with the ability to drive multi-team outcomes across a complex stakeholder landscape. The scope includes our
 **Build & CI platform** 
 and critical developer services such as
 **code repositories (GitHub Enterprise)** 
 ,
 **artifact repositories (Artifactory)** 
 ,
 **asset repository workflows (Perforce)** 
 , and other developer productivity services.
   

  

 Your mission is to make engineering work faster, safer, and more reliable: reducing cycle time and failures, increasing developer self-service, and driving standardization that scales across studios. You should be proactive and self driven.
   

  

 Skills to create thrills
   

  

 People leadership and team health
   

  

* Lead, coach, and develop a high-performing organization; grow managers and senior engineers into strong leaders.
* Build a strong hiring and onboarding pipeline; retain talent through clear career paths and meaningful growth opportunities.
* Create a culture of ownership, psychological safety, accountability, and continuous improvement.


 Platform strategy and delivery
   

  

* Set a clear vision and roadmap for Infrastructure / Developer Platforms aligned with game production needs and company priorities.
* Work with the team on creating a strategy to consolidate old legacy systems and unify our platforms across game studios.
* Translate strategy into executable plans: milestones, resourcing, delivery cadence, and measurable success criteria.
* Drive convergence through platform standards and “golden paths,” reducing fragmentation and long-term maintenance cost.


 Ownership of core developer services
   

  

* Own the reliability, security, and scalability of core developer systems.
* Improve service operations: availability, performance, access controls, compliance, cost efficiency, and user self-service.
* Partner with Security/IT/IAM and other platform teams to ensure strong governance with low friction for developers.


 Modernization and operational excellence
   

  

* Lead modernization initiatives across CI/build tooling and developer services, including migrations and deprecation of legacy solutions.
* Strengthen operational practices: observability, incident management, post-incident learning, and preventative reliability work.
* Reduce developer toil by eliminating recurring pain points and investing in automation and self-service capabilities.


 Outcomes, metrics, and stakeholder leadership
   

  

* Be proactive and self-driven: continuously identify opportunities, propose improvements, and run lightweight experiments to validate impact and drive change.
* Define and track KPIs that reflect real developer impact (e.g., cycle time, failure rate, flakiness, MTTR, satisfaction, service availability).
* Communicate clearly with leadership and stakeholders; align priorities, manage trade-offs, and deliver predictable outcomes.
* Build strong partnerships with game teams, ensuring the platform roadmap reflects real needs and adoption is successful.


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Communications Associate
description:
At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.
   

  

 Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.
   

  

 Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
   

  

*Be part of one of Sweden’s strongest brands, shaping trust among key stakeholders and playing a central role in a rapid, exciting transformation.*
**About The Job**
 At Tele2, we don’t just tell the story – we are shaping it. As Communications Associate, you will play a key role in bringing that story to life across our owned channels and beyond. Your focus will be to create engaging, clear, and compelling content that strengthens our reputation, builds trust, and connects with both employees and external audiences.
   

  

 Reporting to the Executive Vice President, Communications & Sustainability, you will contribute across several important areas:
   

  

**Owned channels:** 
 You will take responsibility for content creation and publishing across web, intranet and social channels such as LinkedIn, ensuring our messaging is always relevant, engaging, and informative when needed.
   

  

**Storytelling & editorial work:** 
 You will identify stories within the business and turn them into sharp, audience-adapted content that inspires, informs and builds engagement. This includes proactive editorial thinking and an ability to apply journalistic principles to ensure high quality and relevance in all communication.
   

  

**Media relations support:** 
 You will contribute to press materials and, on a rotating schedule, be responsible for the press phone and handling incoming media inquiries.
   

  

**General communications support:** 
 You will support campaigns, launches, and corporate initiatives, stepping in where needed in a small, high-performing team.
   

  

 This is a hands-on role where content creation is at the core. You will work close to the business, spotting opportunities to communicate what matters most – whether it’s internal change, a milestone or everyday achievements that deserve attention. As part of a small team, you will have clear areas of responsibility while also acting as a generalist, ready to contribute wherever communication can make a difference and accelerate positive change.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 You are a strong writer with a passion for storytelling. You’re curious about people, business, society, and exploring new ways of effective communication. You enjoy translating complex topics into engaging, accessible content.
   

  

*We believe you have:*
* A degree in journalism or another relevant academic degree in communications, or equivalent extensive editorial experience.
* Demonstrated strong knowledge of editorial working methods and processes, from idea generation to publication, as well as the ability to apply journalistic methods.
* 2-4 years of experience from a newsroom, agency, in-house communications team or similar.
* Excellent writing skills in both English and Swedish with a strong sense of tone, structure and audience adaptation.
* Experience working with digital channels such as the web, intranet, and LinkedIn.
* A proactive mindset and the ability to balance independence with teamwork.


 You are structured and detail-oriented, yet creative and curious. You’re comfortable taking ownership, but you also enjoy collaborating and contributing to a team’s effort. Most importantly, you see communications as more than just content; you see it as a way to build trust and create impact.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Data Architect
description:
**Role summary –** 

 We are looking for a senior Data Architect who will also act as the Technical Product Owner (TPO) for our data platform. This role combines hands-on architecture leadership with product ownership of the technical roadmap and backlog (workload is shared across both responsibilities). Strong Azure data platform experience is required; D365 understanding is a value add.
 





  
 




**Key responsibilities (Data Architecture) –** 



* Define and maintain target-state data architecture (conceptual/logical/physical) and reference patterns.
* Design scalable Azure data solutions (batch + streaming), data models, and integration patterns.
* Ensure security, compliance, performance, reliability, and cost efficiency (FinOps-aware architecture).
* Govern architecture standards, design reviews, and technical decision-making across squads/teams.
* Partner with enterprise architecture, security, and domain teams to align data products with business outcomes.




  
 




**Key responsibilities (Technical Product Owner) –** 



* Own the technical product vision, roadmap, and backlog for the data platform and data products.
* Translate platform needs into epics/features/user stories with clear acceptance criteria and non-functional requirements.
* Prioritize work using value/risk/cost and manage dependencies across integration, analytics, and ERP domains.
* Drive delivery ceremonies with the team (refinement, sprint planning support, demos, release readiness).
* Define and track product metrics (e.g., pipeline reliability SLAs, data quality KPIs, lead time, platform adoption).
* Act as the primary point of contact for platform stakeholders and ensure transparent communication.




  
 














**D365 value-add scope –** 



* Define patterns for consuming/integrating data from D365 F&O / CE, Dataverse, and related integration methods (e.g., data entities, BYOD, dual-write—depending on landscape).
* Support ERP reporting and analytics use cases in finance/supply chain/manufacturing domains.




  
 




**Required qualifications –** 

 7+ years in data architecture / data engineering with architecture ownership. Strong experience with Azure data services, including several of:
 



* ADLS, ADF, Synapse and/or Microsoft Fabric, Databricks
* Event Hubs / streaming concepts
* Azure SQL / SQL MI (and/or other data stores as relevant)
* Strong SQL + data modeling (dimensional and/or data vault).
* Proven ability to drive technical roadmap + backlog (product ownership mindset).
* Strong stakeholder management, communication, and prioritization skills.




  
 




**Nice to have –** 



* Dynamics 365 (F&O/CE) integration and data concepts.
* CI/CD + IaC for data platforms (Azure DevOps/GitHub, Terraform/Bicep).
* Power BI semantic modeling and enterprise reporting patterns.
* Data governance/metadata tools and data observability practices.




  
 




**Key deliverables / outcomes –** 



* Target data architecture + standards, reference designs, reusable templates.
* Prioritized technical roadmap and a well-groomed backlog aligned to measurable outcomes.
* Improved data quality, lineage, reliability, and reduced delivery lead time.
* Increased platform adoption and reduced integration complexity.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Meet the Team
   

  

 Join Cisco's Webex Media engineering site in Stockholm, where we craft the meeting experience that connects people and businesses around the world. We are a highly motivated, startup‑like team within a global organization, combining the impact and resources of Cisco with the agility and camaraderie of a smaller group. Our work powers the shift to a hybrid workforce and aims to make people feel truly connected. You’ll find a friendly, supportive environment that celebrates creativity, growth, and a shared passion for building world‑class real‑time media experiences.
   

  

 Your Impact
   

  

* Bring new real‑time media features to life based on product requirements.
* Perform peer code reviews and automate development workflows and quality gates.
* Participate in agile ceremonies including daily stand‑ups, planning, releases, and retrospectives.
* Collaborate across teams to broaden technical and soft skills through training and mentoring.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* 7+ years of professional software development experience and a MSc (or equivalent) in Software Engineering or a related field.
* Proficiency in C/C++ with strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and design patterns.
* Experience building native applications on Windows, macOS/iOS, Android (NDK), or Linux.
* Experience with media streaming and relevant protocols for real‑time applications.
* Professional verbal and written communication skills in English.
* Uses AI responsibly to accelerate development.
* Critically reviews AI-generated code before using it.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience designing cross‑platform solutions using appropriate patterns and build tools.
* Hands‑on with public cloud platforms (AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud).
* Experience with close‑to‑real‑time systems and performance‑sensitive code paths.
* Comfort with incremental development, testing, and A/B testing in production.
* Collaborative, friendly, and self‑directed; eager to learn and share knowledge.
* Steers AI effectively via context and prompt design.


 CollabHiring
   

  

 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Senior VMware-konsult
description:
Till ett uppdrag hos vår kund i Stockholm söker vi en Senior VMware-konsult som ska ansvara för att designa, vidareutveckla och säkerställa en stabil, säker och effektiv virtualiserings- och molninfrastruktur. Du arbetar med hela livscykeln för IT-infrastruktur; från arkitektur och implementation till drift, automation och kontinuerlig förbättring.
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Rollen passar dig som har minst 5 års djupgående erfarenhet av VMware, kombinerat med flera års tidigare arbete inom IT-infrastruktur, exempelvis inom drift, systemadministration eller datacenter. Du har ett starkt helhetsperspektiv och trivs i miljöer där automation, skalbarhet och stabilitet är affärskritiska.
 



  





 Du ansvarar för VMware-plattformens centrala komponenter och arbetar aktivt med orkestrering, självbetjäning och standardisering genom moderna verktyg och arbetssätt. Du blir en nyckelperson i uppgraderingar, migreringar och vidareutveckling av infrastrukturen, samt samarbetar tätt med nätverk, säkerhet, applikation och andra tekniska team.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 



* Designa, administrera och optimera VMware-miljöer i komplexa IT-landskap
* Arbeta med automation och orkestrering av IT-infrastruktur
* Implementera och vidareutveckla lösningar baserade på VMware Aria Automation och Aria Orchestrator
* Ansvara för virtualiserade nätverkslösningar med VMware NSX-T
* Arbeta med VMware vCloud Director i leverans- och tjänsteorienterade miljöer
* Säkerställa kontinuitet och återställning med VMware SRM / Live Recovery
* Planera och genomföra uppgraderingar, migreringar och förbättringsinitiativ'
* Automatisera drift och leverans med hjälp av script och versionshantering
* Samarbeta med andra team och fungera som teknisk expert och rådgivare



  





**Din profil** 




  





*Krav:* 



* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av arbete med VMware i större eller affärskritiska miljöer
* Tidigare flerårig erfarenhet av arbete inom IT-infrastruktur eller systemdrift
* Mycket goda kunskaper inom automation och orkestrering av IT-infrastruktur
* Mycket goda kunskaper inom:



 - VMware Aria Automation
 



 - VMware Aria Orchestrator
 



 - VMware vCloud Director
 



 - VMware NSX-T
 



 - VMware SRM / Live Recovery
 


* Goda kunskaper i Git (GitHub/GitLab)
* Goda kunskaper i PowerShell
* Goda kunskaper i JavaScript
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska



  





*Meriterande:* 



* Erfarenhet av större datacenter- eller molnmiljöer
* Certifieringar inom VMware (t.ex. VCP, VCAP)
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD-kopplingar mot infrastruktur
* Vana att arbeta enligt DevOps- eller plattformsprinciper



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar.

title: Electrical Engineer, Medium Voltage - Wave Energy (M/F/NB)
description:
Working at CorPower Ocean you will be part of a world class team, determined to make big impact. We are on a mission to Power the Planet with clean electricity from ocean waves. We offer autonomy and flexibility, combined with personal responsibility. CorPower Ocean is a global leader in wave energy, with a technology that has shown game-changing performance. Your work will contribute to the global energy transition by unlocking one of the largest untapped sources of clean energy on earth. Since the start in 2012 CorPower has raised more than 115mEUR to bring our technology to market, supporting a growing commercial project pipeline.
   

  

**Role**
 We are now looking for an ambitious Electrical Engineer with prior experience in Medium Voltage equipment to take an important role in the construction, testing and deployment of our full-scale wave energy converter. This role is based in our Portuguese entity in Viana do Castelo where you will support all related electrical works onshore and offshore.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Together with our Senior MV Electrical engineer you will install, inspect, repair, replace, maintain, and make necessary test on all low to medium voltage wave energy converter (WEC & Hub) systems, equipment, transformers, switchgear, generators, and distribution systems.
* Contribute to develop submarine cabling and WEC installation work packages to define scopes of work and to support the project scheduling.
* Ensure that all assets, of the electrical offshore deployment plan, are installed to the quality and engineering standards.
* Support the refurbishment and the operation of onshore project related existing assets, as well as all related power supply systems of the research centre manufacturing hall.
* Generate effective and accurate written documents, reports, and technical drawings.
* Interface with internal and external customers regarding the low and medium onshore and offshore electrical systems.
* Work where necessary, with other functions, to assist in achieving overall project objectives.


**Skills And Qualifications**
* Minimum of 5 years relevant working experience on medium voltage equipment; switchgear, transformers, and generators.
* Bachelor's degree in electrical engineering is meriting
* Medium voltage experience, both academic and industrial, in new product development.
* Knowledge specific and applicable Portuguese standards related to electrical engineering, grid connection and overall electrical compliance.
* Hands-on experience in wire assembly and cable repair, having some mechanical machine assembly experience is meriting.
* MV splicing, termination and cable repair experience with MV protection equipment and control devices is meriting
* Ability to climb ladders, work in tight spaces and to perform tasks that require standing, kneeling, crouching, and climbing hand over hand.
* Prepared and willing to work in challenging marine outdoor environments.
* Besides your formal training and degree, your personality, experience, and interest in the field, having passion for technology and machines in general is also important.
* Proficient in Portuguese and English, both spoken and written (colloquial and technical).


**As a Person**
* You are striving for excellence and put quality into everything you do
* You love to learn new things and take pride in constantly developing your skills
* You always searching for the most simple and elegant solutions to difficult problems
* You are persistent, knowing it takes stamina to reach ambitious goals
* You are data driven and strive to always back your points with a solid analysis you are outspoken and like to interact with colleagues, partners and suppliers


**Benefits Include**
* 5 extra days of vacation.
* Meal card for the maximum non-taxable amount.
* Company cell phone and laptop.


 CorPower Ocean has a highly diversified team with many nationalities and backgrounds, all working towards the same goal of Powering the Planet by ocean waves.
