title: Cyber Security Architect
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtidens IT-säkerhet i en av Sveriges ledande bankkoncerner? Som Cyber Security Architect inom LF Bank blir du en samhällsviktig spelare som säkerställer att banken har en trygg IT-miljö för både kunder och kollegor*
***Om rollen***
 Som Cyber Security Architect ansvarar du för att utveckla och genomföra bankens målarkitektur inom IT-säkerhet. Du blir en del av ett kompetent och engagerat team som värdesätter samarbete, utveckling och säkerhet. Du samarbetar brett inom banken och koncernen, förhindrar säkerhetsincidenter och implementerar effektiva styrmodeller. Du tar fram och inför styrande dokument, processer och rutiner tillsammans med kollegor inom informationssäkerhet och IT.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Ge arkitekturstöd och leda operativt arbete inom säkerhet
* Dokumentera och implementera riktlinjer, processer och ramverk
* Identifiera och hantera säkerhetsrisker i projekt och system
* Ge tekniskt stöd och rådgivning kring säkerhetslösningar
* Delta i samarbeten och utbildningar för att stärka säkerhetskulturen
* Omvärldsbevaka och föreslå förbättringar inom IT-säkerhet


*Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:*
* Gedigen erfarenhet av IT-säkerhet i komplexa miljöer
* Erfarenhet som arkitekt eller i senior teknisk roll
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar och säkerhetsarkitektur i molnet
* God teknisk förståelse inom IT-infrastruktur och utveckling
* Erfarenhet av agil metodik och CI/CD
* Certifiering inom arkitektur (t.ex. SABSA, TOGAF)
* Kännedom om bankregelverk (DORA, GDPR, PCI-DSS)


*Personliga egenskaper*
 Som person är du en analytisk lagspelare med starkt driv och passion för IT-säkerhet, där ”Security by Design” är en självklarhet. Du är självgående, strukturerad och lösningsfokuserad, med en tydlig förmåga att arbeta målinriktat. Din kommunikativa förmåga gör att du enkelt etablerar och underhåller ett brett kontaktnät i komplexa organisationer, och du bidrar till en positiv och trivsam arbetsmiljö.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: jonny.knutas@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: christina.berg@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Länsförsäkringar Bank är en av Sveriges största och mest omtyckta banker, med ett brett utbud av tjänster inom betalningar, sparande, bolån och fonder. I arbetet mot vår vision "Tillsammans skapar vi trygghet och möjligheter" hoppas vi att du vill bidra med ditt engagemang och nyfikenhet för effektivisering, AI samt omvärldsspaning av moderna verktyg och metoder för att driva vår utveckling framåt.

title: Master Data Analyst
description:
Do you want to work in a global company where you can contribute to a more sustainable food production? DeLaval is a leading developer, manufacturer, and supplier of solutions for dairy farmers around the world. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers do more with less.
   

  

**Role And Responsibilities**
 In the area of Data Management we are seeking an Analyst who will work to ensure the quality and consistency of global master data within DeLaval. In this role your task is to continuously improve and simplify our way of working with SAP and support and drive assignments/projects in the MDM area.
   

  

**Purpose Of Role And Key Responsibilities**
* Drive / participate improvement assignments/projects in the Master Data area
* Creates processes to ensure master data quality and consistency
* Enhance the usage of data as a base for business development
* Drive Automation and simplification of our way of working with data, cross sites, systems and functions


**Qualifications**
 To be successful in this role we believe that you have:
   

  

* Computer Science Master degree, or extensive practical experience
* Experience in Master Data Management
* Experience in SAP ERP (SD,MM, Query creation), and in particular SAP S/4 HANA and SAP MDG is a plus
* Experience from Business Transformation or Business Development from a Value Chain perspective is seen as a plus
* Project Management experience from 3-5 large scale cross functional projects
* Experience from Conceptual Data Modelling is seen as a plus
* Fluent in English, spoken and written


**Working at DeLaval**
 Our core values Passion, People, Professionals and Partnerships connect individuals across entities and geographies. Success is far more than knowledge – it is strongly related to behaviour. At DeLaval we are all guided by our three behaviours: Set Direction, Make Things Happen and One DeLaval.
   

  

 We Offer You a Workplace Like No Other, Where State-of-the-art Technology Goes Hand In Hand With Animal Welfare. DeLaval Is a Part Of The Tetra Laval Group Together With Tetra Pak And Sidel. In Addition, We Offer
   

  

* Secure employment and benefits from the collective agreement (occupational pension, work-related accident insurance).
* Parental leave compensation (approx. 10 percent of the employee's monthly salary).
* Wellness allowance of SEK 4 000/year.
* Private healthcare insurance.
* Flexible working hours and reduced working hours.
* 30 days paid annual leave.


**Additional Information**
 This is a full-time permanent position based at DeLaval’s headquarters in Tumba, south of Stockholm. We offer a hybrid workplace model, allowing flexibility to work remotely.
   

  

 We review applications ongoing. We do not accept applications via email, however if you have any questions regarding the role or the recruitment process don’t hesitate to contact us.
   

  

**Contact**
 Hiring manager: Per Guhres, per.guhres@delaval.com
   

  

 Recruiter: Agnes Edbom, agnes.edbom@delaval.com
   

  

**About DeLaval**
 Our vision is to make sustainable food production possible. As a company built on innovation, we constantly work to find ways of helping our customers, dairy farmers, do more with less by providing world-leading milking equipment and solutions.
   

  

 Today, DeLaval has approximately 4,500 passionate professionals operating in more than 100 markets around the world. DeLaval is part of the Tetra Laval Group.
   

  

 See more at corporate.delaval.com

title: Key Account Manager
description:
**Lenus is looking for a Key Account Manager for our Stockholm office!**
**Join the health revolution!**
 At Lenus we are fundamentally energized by our shared vision: making the world a healthier and happier place. Could you see yourself working for a great purpose in a dynamic, global culture? Then we might be a great match
   

  

**Who are we looking for?**
 At Lenus, we’re building the future of holistic health. As a Key Account Manager in our Stockholm office, you’ll target, onboard, and support the leading online health and fitness coaches across the globe to achieve lasting success. If you’re passionate about sales, strategic growth, and business innovation and thrive on creating impactful relationships, this role is your next career step. We’re looking for a true sales maverick with a collaborative mindset, and a vision to empower others in their journey to success.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Target & Empower Coaches: You will build your portfolio of coaches by scouting, reaching out, pitching, and convincing them to partner with Lenus.
* Guiding Health Coaches: Manage and support a portfolio of 15-20 health and fitness coaches, helping them grow their businesses sustainably and positively impact their clients' lives.
* Enabling Business Growth: Collaborate on strategies that blend innovative marketing, smart sales tactics, and tailored business development initiatives to enhance our coaches’ impact.
* Building Partnerships: Foster trust-based relationships with coaches that go beyond transactions, making you their go-to collaborator.
* Ensuring Quality Excellence: Coordinate and manage projects precisely, participate in key meetings, and deliver exceptional service in line with Lenus’s commitment to quality.


**Qualifications**
**We value diverse experiences and backgrounds. While not all qualifications are mandatory, the ideal candidate should possess:**
* Sales and Growth Advocate: 2+ years of experience in sales, account management, and business development. You are driven by results, not just activity.
* Digital and Social Media Enthusiast: Experience in social media marketing is a plus but not required; we’ll help you grow these skills!
* Collaborative Innovator: You approach challenges with creativity and teamwork, thinking like a co-founder invested in your partners' success.
* Exceptional Relationship Builder: You thrive in creating connections and fostering partnerships with diverse stakeholders.
* Language Skills: You communicate fluently in Swedish, and are confident in English - both orally and in writing.


 We encourage you to apply even if you don't tick all the boxes!
   

  

**Please submit your application in English.**
**The Team**
 Join our dynamic Stockholm Key Account Management team, where you’ll collaborate with a driven group of professionals including a dedicated Team Lead and experienced Senior Key Account Managers. Together, we are passionate about helping online coaches grow and scale their businesses.
   

  

 You'll work cross-functionally with our Inbound Sales, Branding, and Paid Marketing teams to create impactful strategies and deliver exceptional results. With access to a wealth of knowledge and mentorship from seasoned Key Account Managers, this is your chance to make a tangible difference while advancing your career in an inspiring and supportive environment.
   

  

**Benefits & Perks**
* A central role in a hyper-relevant scale-up company in one of the world's fastest growing industries: online health and fitness.
* Uncapped Earnings - Your effort, strategy, and results directly shape your success and income.
* Access to Mentor and training from our marketing manager.
* Opportunity to be awarded equity and share in Lenus’ long-term growth and success.
* A small and close-knit team of 15 people in Stockholm, with lots of ownership, responsibility and energy.
* Our offices are set up with fruits, snack bars, and a selection of drinks for daily snacks and fuel.
* Healthy daily snacks and fuel. Our offices are set up with fruits, snack bars, and a selection of drinks.
* Dog friendly offices
* A Macbook and other hardware to support you in your daily work.


 We'll be going through applications frequently, so if this sounds like a great opportunity for you, hit apply and our Talent Acquisition Team will go through it and be in touch with you!
   

  

**Please submit your application in English.**
**About Lenus**
 Lenus was founded in Denmark by Bertram Thorslund, in 2016. We are a health technology company that empowers health coaches to scale their businesses through the use of pioneering technology and our in-house business, health, and innovation expertise.
   

  

 We’re inspiring a new generation of health coaches. People who have the power to move not only bodies but minds too. We are at the forefront of an industry under rapid transformation and our strategic innovations pave the path for the change we want to see. Happier and healthier people.
   

  

 In 2021, Lenus received the largest series A funding round in Denmark’s history. Since then the company has grown from 5 to over 350 employees and today, Lenus is headquartered in Copenhagen, with offices in New York, London, Stockholm, Berlin, Hamburg, Madrid, Helsinki, Oslo, Toronto, Miami, Southern California, Aarhus, Amsterdam & beyond.
   

  

***At Lenus, we value diverse perspectives and experiences. Even if you don’t meet every qualification, we encourage you to apply. Your unique skills and background could be just what we need to make a difference together.***
*We commit to an inclusive recruitment process and equality of opportunity for all our job applicants.
   

  

 We care about your privacy, personal data and information at Lenus.*
*For specific details on how your personal data and information is processed by Lenus during any recruitment process, please see our privacy policy.*
**Specific To EU Applicants**
 Lenus will treat all personal information collected during the recruitment process with the utmost confidentiality and in line with current data protection legislation. We rely on the lawful basis of Art. 6 (1) (b) of the GDPR to process the information provided by you in the recruitment process.
   

  

**Specific To California Applicants**
 Lenus will treat all personal information collected during the recruitment process with the utmost confidentiality and in line with current data protection legislation.

title: Gameplay Engineer – LLMs, Creator Tools & Narrative Systems
description:
As a Gameplay Engineer on Embark's Machine Learning team, you will help shape the future of storytelling tools and systems for video games.
   

  

 We believe modern AI can unlock entirely new creative workflows for narrative design, quest building, lore creation, and player-facing reactivity. Our goal is to investigate how we can design new tools and systems that enable creators to be more ambitious, collaborate more effectively, and explore ideas with less friction rather than simply automating existing workflows.
   

  

 In this role, you will build gameplay-facing systems, tools, and integrations that make AI useful in real production environments—practical, controllable, debuggable, and aligned with the creative vision. You'll work closely with writers, researchers, designers, and other engineers to explore different levels of AI agency to intentionally design where AI agency makes sense and where it doesn't.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who is excited about creative tooling, loves building things that people actually use, and is genuinely enthusiastic about what new AI techniques can enable in games.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Build gameplay systems and tools that enable new narrative workflows and faster iteration for creators
* Collaborate with designers and narrative teams to understand creative needs and turn them into intuitive tooling
* Develop engine integrations and "hooks" that expose the right information for analysis, validation, and experimentation
* Create debugging and diagnostics workflows that make complex systems understandable and easy to iterate on
* Work with writers and designers to explore and prototype AI-native gameplay mechanics that preserve authorial intent while enabling emergence and reactivity
* Prototype experimental features quickly, then help mature the best ideas into robust production-ready solutions
* Help design and evaluate different degrees of AI autonomy, balancing creative ambition, reliability, and control
* Help ensure AI-assisted workflows remain controllable, transparent, and human-driven
* Work across disciplines to integrate tools into real game development pipelines, not isolated demos


**We would love if you have**
* Strong gameplay engineering experience and excellent C++ skills
* Experience working in Unreal Engine
* A passion for tooling, iteration speed, and developer experience
* A creator mindset: you enjoy building systems that make other people more effective
* Comfort collaborating with designers and translating creative goals into technical solutions
* Professional English communication skills


**Additionally, It's a Bonus If You Have**
* Experience building editor tools or content workflows in Unreal Engine
* Familiarity with language models, AI tooling, evaluation, or "human-in-the-loop" creative systems
* Experience with narrative systems, quest pipelines, or other creator-driven game features
* Python experience, or interest in working across engine + services/tooling


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 We welcome game makers of all sex, class, colour, age, gender identity, education, religion, opinion, culture, nation of origin, language, sexual orientation, shape, size, and ability.
   

  

 Did we leave anyone out? Well, we welcome you, too! We think that the gaming industry is made better when everyone has a seat at the table.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Team Leader, Sourcing Project Manager
description:
**With a passion for life**
 Join our diverse teams of passionate people and a career that allows you to develop both personally and professionally. At Getinge we exist to make life-saving technology accessible for more people. To make a true difference for our customers – and to save more lives, we need team players, forward thinkers, and game changers.
   

  

 Are you looking for an inspiring career? You just found it.
   

  

 In this role, you will join Getinge’s Sourcing Project Management team. Sourcing Project Managers focus on Product Development Projects (PDP), this position plays a key part in driving other types of sourcing-related projects and initiatives such as supplier transfer projects, task force activities, CAPA leadership, and implementation of new regulatory requirements.
   

  

 You will act as the coordinating force for how we plan, execute, and improve sourcing-related project delivery, working closely with R&D, Supplier Quality Engineering, Strategic Sourcing, and several other functions.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 In this role, you will lead sourcing-related projects and help develop our ways of working. Your main responsibilities include:
   

  

* Plan, lead, and follow up on sourcing projects from initiation to completion according to established methodologies.
* Drive cross-functional initiatives such as supplier changes, production/test relocations, supply-critical task forces, and CAPA projects.
* Manage projects related to regulatory changes (e.g., MDR/IVDR, ISO updates) and ensure compliance deliverables.
* Coordinate resource needs and project interfaces between Sourcing and R&D, ensuring alignment, prioritization, and effective governance.
* Facilitate risk assessments, decision forums, workshops, and cross-functional collaboration to secure quality, compliance, and timely delivery.
* As a team leader coordinate the resource allocation in the team and make sure the PDP projects are support t in a good way.
* Develop the way of working within the team.


 This position is based in Solna and is eligible for a hybrid setup. Occasional travel may be required depending on project needs.
   

  

**You will bring**
 To be successful in this position, we believe you have:
   

  

* Several years of experience in project management within sourcing, procurement, supply chain, industry, med tech, or another regulated environment.
* Proven ability to lead cross-functional projects with multiple stakeholders especially R&D.
* Strong understanding of supplier-related processes such as transfer, change control, risk management, and quality requirements.
* Experience with CAPA, supplier-related nonconformances, and/or regulatory-driven change projects is an advantage.
* Excellent communication skills and confidence when driving decisions in complex environments.


 In addition to your technical skills, we highly value your personality.
   

  

 We believe you are structured, proactive, and solution oriented — someone who can manage several parallel initiatives while maintaining a high degree of quality and compliance. You collaborate effectively, communicate openly with stakeholders, and thrive in situations where you need to lead without formal people management responsibility.
   

  

 You are eager to grow, stay up to date with industry standards, and continuously improve processes, tools, and ways of working.
   

  

 At Getinge, we see ourselves as proactive team players who always aim to move forward and challenge the status quo.
   

  

 You will thrive here if you appreciate high expectations, fast-paced collaboration, and making a real impact on patient safety and global healthcare.
   

  

**Why join Getinge**
 Getinge offers a safe and informal work environment where teamwork and open communication are essential. We invest in developing our people — together, we will build a tailored learning and development plan as you begin your journey with us.
   

  

 We offer a competitive compensation and benefits package, including wellness allowances, generous family benefits, and company activities designed to support your well-being.
   

  

**Application**
 Applications will be reviewed continuously, so we encourage you to submit your application as soon as possible, and no later than 2026-03-25.
   

  

 Please submit your application through our recruitment system by clicking the “Apply now” button. Due to GDPR regulations, we do not accept applications via e‑mail.
   

  

 If you have any questions regarding the role, please contact Talent Acquisition Partner responsible, Gustaf Ericson, at gustaf.ericson@getinge.com .
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application.
   

  

**About Us**
 With a firm belief that every person and community should have access to the best possible care, Getinge provides hospitals and life science institutions with products and solutions aiming to improve clinical results and optimize workflows. The offering includes products and solutions for intensive care, cardiovascular procedures, operating rooms, sterile reprocessing and life science. Getinge employs over 12,000 people worldwide and the products are sold in more than 135 countries.

title: Säkerhetshandläggare med inriktning informationssäkerhet
description:
**Enheten för informations- och personalsäkerhet, Sektionen för informationssäkerhet och signalskydd, RK Säkerhet, Förvaltningsavdelningen**
 Vill du arbeta i en utvecklande miljö där du blir en viktig del av det systematiska säkerhetsarbetet i Regeringskansliet? Har du erfarenhet av arbetet med informationssäkerhet i en större organisation med inriktning kring it-system och är van vid att arbeta på både strategisk, taktisk och operativ nivå? Som medarbetare hos oss får du ett uppdrag där du bidrar till Sveriges säkerhet genom att arbeta med frågor som rör informationssäkerhet i Regeringskansliet.
   

  

**Din arbetsdag. Sveriges morgondag.**
 Som säkerhetshandläggare informationssäkerhet har du en central roll där du främst arbetar med informationssäkerhet med inriktning informationssäkerhet i molntjänstsäkerhet. Det handlar bland annat om att arbeta med analys, normering och uppföljning, samt med kravställning gällande informationssäkerheten i IT-projekt och IT-leveranser.
   

  

 I rollen ingår även att vidareutveckla metodik och arbetsformer inom området och du stöder även sektionens övriga kompetensområden. Du deltar aktivt i det systematiska arbetet för att utveckla säkerhetsskyddet inom Regeringskansliet. Tillsammans med dina kollegor är du en viktig del av Regeringskansliets säkerhetsarbete.
   

  

 Läs mer om vår verksamhet på: www.regeringen.se.
   

  

**Din bakgrund**
 Vi söker dig som har högskoleutbildning med inriktning mot data och system eller säkerhet, risk- och krishantering, alternativt annan lämplig utbildning inom säkerhetsområdet eller IT-området i kombination med arbetslivserfarenhet som är relevant för befattningen. Vidare har flerårig aktuell erfarenhet av normering och kravställning av informationssäkerhet med särskild inriktning kring it-system. Alternativt har du liknade erfarenhet som Regeringskansliet bedömer som likvärdig. Du har även erfarenhet av att arbeta med informationssäkerhet på ett systematiskt och riskbaserat sätt, samt har kunskap om de lagar och förordningar som styr säkerhetsskyddet i Sverige. God förståelse för hur informationssäkerhet kan påverka IT-säkerheten är också ett krav.
   

  

 Det är meriterande om du har för tjänsten relevant produktutbildning i molntjänster samt om du har erfarenhet av arbete med efterlevnad av regelverk i molnleveranser. Det är även meriterande med säkerhetsarbete på alla nivåer, på både strategisk- taktisk- och operativ nivå. Kunskap om metoder och modeller rörande risk- och sårbarhetsanalyser samt erfarenhet av arbete med relevanta IT-projekt med molninriktning är också meriterande.
   

  

 Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och goda kunskaper i engelska, både i tal och skrift är ett krav.
   

  

**Dina egenskaper**
 Regeringskansliets medarbetarkriterier är helhet, utveckling och resultat. Alla som arbetar i Regeringskansliet behöver ha helhetssyn och samarbeta för verksamhetens bästa. Du förväntas bidra med ditt perspektiv och din kompetens samt vara öppen för andras. Du kommer med idéer och nya angreppssätt för att förbättra och utveckla verksamheten och din egen kompetens. Du är inriktad på resultat i ditt agerande och anpassar dig när behov och inriktning ändras. Vi ser även att du är tydlig och har förmåga att utbilda och skapa förståelse för informationssäkerhet på flera nivåer och i olika målgrupper. Gott omdöme är en central egenskap, då vi ser att du har förmåga att på ett betryggande sätt hantera en större mängd skyddsvärd information.
   

  

 Läs mer på: Medarbetarskap och ledarskap i Regeringskansliet - Regeringen.se
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Tjänsten är en eller flera tillsvidareanställningar med sex månaders provanställning som start. Befattningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas. Du måste vara svensk medborgare, men får gärna ha utländsk bakgrund.
   

  

**Är du intresserad?**
 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder kontakta Mikael Palmgren som är sektionschef på 08-405 31 38. Du är också välkommen att kontakta rekryteringsspecialist Siri Hågefalk på 08-405 87 83. Fackliga kontakter är Johan Strokirk för Saco Jan Wahlström för ST. Du når dem via Regeringskansliets växel, 08-405 10 00.
   

  

 Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster
   

  

 Välkommen att registrera din ansökan i vårt rekryteringsverktyg
 **senast den 6:e april 2026**

title: Country Manager Denmark Sweden (PlayOJO)
description:
**Company Description**
 We are SkillOnNet, leading the igaming entertainment by providing our customers with the most entertaining and trustworthy experience possible, while also reinventing the gambling industry. We are home to more than 30 well-known brands, including PlayOJO, DruckGluck, BacanaPlay, Genting, and many more. We are committed to long-term development and sustainability, and we are trying to revolutionise our industry for the benefit of our players, ourselves, and the entertainment industry as a whole.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Part of Skill On Net, PlayOJO.com is an award winning, cutting edge and innovative online casino challenger brand. Running on our own proprietary casino and player management platform we’ve been operating since 2017 across several regulated iGaming markets in Europe, North America and LatAm. PlayOJO has experienced exceptional success and is one of the fastest growing casino and bingo sites in Europe and is looking to follow that success in Denmark and Sweden.
   

  

 We seek an energetic individual who has keen interest in brand development and acquisition-based marketing. You will work closely with the central brand marketing, digital marketing, affiliates, and CRM teams and be the champion of all local advertising and player communication channels.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to take a leading role in the building of a new business in a strategically important region and join a company which is experiencing rapid growth through aggressive investment in its people, brand, and product offering.
   

  

**Responsibilities Include**
* Develop strategic plans for the development of brand building and acquisition marketing activities across the region.
* Develop and manage customer acquisition media channels: Above the line TV &radio, sponsorships, print, out of home and PR.
* Responsibility for digital marketing and other harvesting performance-based marketing channels working with in-house as well as external agencies.
* Develop and manage relationships with local 3rd parties such as media agencies, media groups, marketing, creative and production agencies. This includes agency selection and commercial negotiations.
* Ownership of substantial annual marketing plan, respective budgets and targets.
* Brand champion for the local brand including adaptation of global brand positioning, creative and tone of voice as well as creation of bespoke local brand assets and marketing campaigns.
* Undertake pre and post initiative analysis and reporting to provide campaign ROI, CPA and optimisation for future campaigns.
* Adhere to all gambling rules and regulations across all communication channels.


**What we are looking for:**
* 5+ years’ experience working in a similar marketing leadership role agency or client side in high transactional volume industry.
* 3+ years’ experience working in B2C online gaming in the Denmark and sweden
* Proven track record of successfully launching a new brand and achieving rapid business growth in Scandinavia.
* In-depth knowledge of the Scandinavian advertising and media space including establishing and maintaining business relationships with specialist media agencies and media owners.
* Demonstrating hands on approach proven track record in managing significant above the line marketing budgets, campaigns ownerships from beginning to end, including briefing, forecasting, tracking, reporting and performance analysis.
* Experience is people management including recruitment, training, and personal development.
* Native linguistic skills in either Swedish and or Danish


**What's in it for YOU?**
* Excellent work environment
* Attractive salary package
* Monetary vouchers on Birthdays and other special occasions
* Casual dress code
* A chance to advance professionally inside one of the world's largest iGaming organisations


**What Life at SkillOnNet is like!**
 SkillOnNet is a firm believer in putting people first and our “family oriented” multinational culture is what drives us. We care and focus on our staff and ensure that you are provided with the most relevant and valuable tools, privileges and amenities.

title: Säkerhetsanalytiker till Soya Group AB
description:
Vill du spela en nyckelroll i arbetet med att stärka säkerheten inom en av Sveriges mest dynamiska företagsgrupper och bidra till Sveriges totalförsvarsförmåga?
 



  





 Soya Group AB söker nu en erfaren säkerhetsanalytiker som vill bidra till att utveckla koncernens säkerhets- och analysförmåga. I rollen ansvarar du för kvalificerat analysarbete, bedömningar och beslutsunderlag kopplat till säkerhetsfrågor i hela koncernen. Du blir en del av säkerhetsavdelningen i Stockholm och rapporterar till säkerhetschefen. Tjänsten ingår i avdelningens beredskapsorganisation. 
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 Som säkerhetsanalytiker får du en central och självständig roll med breda kontaktytor. Du kommer bland annat att: 
 


* Självständigt genomföra analysarbete genom underrättelsecykelns alla faser.
* Identifiera och bedöma relevanta säkerhetshot mot verksamheten.
* Ta fram skriftliga analyser, bedömningar och lägesbilder.
* Presentera analyser och slutsatser muntligt och skriftligt för ledning och berörda funktioner.
* Delta i beredskapsarbete och bidra vid incidenter med snabb analys, lägesbild och stöd till verksamheten.
* Samverka med interna och externa aktörer inom säkerhet, analys och beredskap.



  





**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har** 



* Mångårig erfarenhet som säkerhetsanalytiker, omvärldsanalytiker eller motsvarande.
* Akademisk examen inom säkerhet, statsvetenskap, kriminologi eller annat relevant område.
* Mycket god förmåga att arbeta självständigt, strukturerat och metodiskt.
* Mycket god analytisk förmåga och vana att hantera komplex information.
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga i tal och skrift på svenska.
* Hög integritet, gott omdöme och ett tydligt säkerhetsmedvetande.
* Meriterande är erfarenhet av säkerhetsskyddsarbete, beredskap eller underrättelseverksamhet.
* Bakgrund inom Försvarsmakten, rättsvårdande myndigheter, samhällsviktig verksamhet är meriterande.



  





**Övrigt** 




 Tjänsten omfattar säkerhetsprövning och särskild urvalsprocess.
 



  





**Om arbetsplatsen** 




 Soya Group AB är moderbolag i en koncern som består av flera bolag inom sjöfart (Wallenius Lines och Wallenius Marine), fastigheter (Wallfast och Hässelby Hem) stuteri, lant- och skogsbruk (Menhammar Stuteri och Menhammar Gård) samt vattenrening (Wallenius Water Innovation). All verksamhet drivs utifrån pionjäranda, långsiktighet och socialt ansvar.
 



  





 Koncernen är dessutom involverat i flera externa bolag med stort engagemang inom hållbar sjöfart och har medarbetare i både Europa och Asien.
 



 Det första bolaget inom Soya Group bildades 1934 av grundaren Olof Wallenius. Det fick sitt namn, Rederi AB Soya, efter den last som koncernens första fartyg fraktade, nämligen soyaolja. Idag är Rederi AB Soya ett holdingbolag och äger bland annat Soya Group AB.

title: Data Engineering Functional Lead
description:
**Mission**
 Neko Health exists to shift healthcare from treating illness to preventing it, using advanced, non‑invasive technology and clinical expertise to deliver early, actionable health insights.
   

  

 Neko Health is a Swedish healthcare technology company co-founded in 2018 by Hjalmar Nilsonne and Daniel Ek. Neko's vision is to shift healthcare from reactive treatment toward preventative health and early detection. This requires completely reimagining the patient's experience and incorporating the latest advances in sensors and AI. Neko Health has developed a new medical scanning technology concept to make it possible to do broad and non-invasive health data collection that is convenient and affordable for the public. The company is based in Stockholm, offering the Neko Body Scan experience at locations in Stockholm, London and Manchester, with over 500 employees.
   

  

**The Role**
 We are hiring a
 **Data Engineering Functional Lead (DE FL)** 
 to join our Data & AI leadership team and support Neko’s AI vision and execution. This role will be central to how we build and scale AI and Analytics across the company. Specific areas of responsibility include developing our data infrastructure and data systems supporting the needs of Data Science and Data Analytics, enabling efficient delivery of data-driven products and insights at relevant scale of operations
   

  

 What You’ll Deliver in the First 6–12 Months
   

  

* Own and execute Neko’s Data Engineering strategy, establishing a long-term vision for our data infrastructure that keeps us at the forefront of preventive health (Chase 10X, not 10%).
* Build and scale data systems for large-scale ingestion, multi-regional needs, storage, and data modelling — delivering the platform that underpins our Data Science and Analytics teams (Tech-enabled, human-centred).
* Establish clear ways of working and common tooling across engineering, driving efficient communication and alignment that improves delivery velocity and cross-functional integration (Hard truths, high hopes).
* Build a data platform supporting responsible AI — embedding fairness, privacy, explainability, and compliance (EU MDR, FDA, HIPAA, GDPR) into how we work from day one (Member-first, always).
* Contribute hands-on to key deliverables while balancing current execution with future architectural needs, setting the standard for technical excellence across the team.
* Support the growth, well-being, and performance of the data engineering function, fostering a positive and collaborative culture that attracts and retains world-class talent.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* 5+ years in Data Engineering leadership, with proven track record of scaling data systems from startup to large and international scale.
* Experience building scalable data infrastructure (data platforms) and data governance frameworks for multi-region, sensitive data environments.
* Strong software design, SQL, and Python skills.
* Ability to inspire and grow a world-class team.
* Strategic leader with both hands-on credibility and organizational influence.
* Adept at delivering impact working in circumstances with large uncertainty and in discovery-driven phases.


**Preferred**
* Experience leading Data Engineering in a global, mission-driven company.
* Experience with sensitive data, ideally health data, and compliance.
* Experience with GPU workloads in Databricks.


**About The Engineering Team**
 Distributed and Remote First
   

  

 We are nearly 100 full time engineers at the company, working from Berlin, Chamonix, Hamburg, Lisbon, Marseille, Vilnius, and Stockholm, spanning diverse disciplines such as Hardware Engineering, Firmware Development, Electrical Design, Algorithm Development, Machine Learning Development, Optronics Research, Frontend Development and more. We don't expect people to join us with a specific tech knowledge, but we do expect you to work with our tools. We use a mix of React, Typescript, C++, and Python. Our APIs are written in C# with ASP.NET Core, uses Azure Cosmos DB, and Azure Active Directory for authentication.
   

  

 Our headquarters and our hardware development team are in Stockholm, Sweden.
   

  

 We are a Remote First company; however, it is of course much easier to work remotely as a software engineer than a hardware or firmware engineer (since they require access to hardware or devices occasionally). Software engineers based in Stockholm work maybe one day a week or one day every two weeks from the office.
   

  

 We meet a couple of times per year to get to know each other and have fun.
   

  

 Organization and Way of Working
   

  

 The engineering team is divided into smaller cross functional project teams that each focus on a specific goal or target, where some groups are long-lived, and some are short-lived, depending on how big the goal or deliverable is. We strive to create groups which are cross-functional and able to complete their goals without dependence on other teams, even though this is of course not always possible.
   

  

 Groups track goals on a yearly and quarterly basis with goal follow-up across the entire engineering organization on a bi-weekly basis. Most groups do internal planning on a bi-weekly basis, but in the end it's up to the group to decide how they want to work.
   

  

 We have, however, mandated that all groups must present their progress or failures or hacks at our bi-weekly engineering demo, a fun meeting/presentation where we talk about everything from short-circuiting power-modules, how hard it is to calibrate cameras or align polygons in space, to neat new command line tools for operations, a new auth mechanism in the backend, a cool new way to visualize health data or a new feature which helps our doctors be more productive.
   

  

 We have a flexible workplace that focuses on work/life balance, and we strongly believe in our mission but do not think that achieving it requires sacrificing everything else
   

  

**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.

title: ERP Program- & Project Manager
description:
**Vill du ta dig an utvecklande uppdrag tillsammans med branschens mest erfarna?** 




  





 Midagon är en nordisk, oberoende verksamhets- och IT-konsultbolag specialiserad på att genomföra utmanande transformationsprojekt och program. Vi är över 230 anställda i Norden, varav närmare 100 befinner sig i Sverige. Vi driver uppdrag i både privat och offentlig sektor, åt globala aktörer såväl som nationella företag. Våra uppdrag varierar i storlek, men gemensamt är att vi hjälper våra kunder att lyckas med sina komplexa transformationer, där vi kan stoltsera med långa kundrelationer samt flertalet egna ramavtal.
 



  





 Våra erfarna konsulter har fokus på digitala transformationer med bland annat inriktning på verksamhetsutveckling, projekt- & programledning eller specialkompetens inom specifika ämnesområden. Hos oss hittar du de bästa av de bästa. Ett ypperligt kvitto på detta är våra utmärkelser såsom Sveriges nöjdaste kunder (Radar) och 9 års certifiering av ”Great place to work”.
 



  





 Vill du också vara del av ett team av seniora konsulter, där avslappnad atmosfär går hand i hand med ett engagerat arbete och sund livsbalans?
 



  





**Rollen** 




 I denna roll leder du komplexa transformationsprojekt i nära samarbete med våra eller kundens projektledare och verksamhetsutvecklare. Du stöttar kunden genom hela förändringsresan – från tidig projektstart och förstudie till implementering och överlämning. Med din expertis fungerar du som en oberoende rådgivare och bidrar till att kunden når sina affärsmål och står väl rustad för framtida utmaningar.
 



  





 Internt på Midagon blir du en del av ett team av seniora konsulter med djup erfarenhet inom ERP-området - inom exempelvis tillverkande industri, supply chain och ekonomi. Teamet besitter bred kompetens och erfarenhet från både olika roller och systemleverantörer, där samarbete och kunskapsutbyte är centrala delar av arbetet.
 



  





**Vi söker dig som:** 



* Har mångårig konsulterfarenhet inom ERP-transformationer
* Har lett projekt inom affärs- och IT-transformationer inom ERP-program, M&A, verksamhetsarkitektur eller industriella digitaliseringsprojekt
* Är insatt i flera ledande ERP-system som SAP, M3, IFS eller Dynamics
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på både svenska och engelska



  





 För att trivas hos oss krävs kombination av entusiasm, pragmatism samt ett metodist tillvägagångssätt. Både ledarskaps- och projektledningserfarenhet är avgörande, liksom färdigheter inom förändringsledning.
 



  





**Är du nyfiken?** 




 Läs gärna mer om oss och Våra tidigare uppdrag, på hemsidan kan du också enkelt registrerar din ansökan. Har du ytterligare frågor eller funderingar, tveka inte att kontakta Martin Nilsson inom HR-& rekrytering på martin.nilsson@midagon.com / 070-2257833.
 



  





 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Enhetschef Arkitekturstyrning
description:
Svenska kraftnät är en nyckelaktör i energiomställningen. Vår IT-division växer. För att möjliggöra en fördubblad elproduktion och en fossilfri framtid med den senaste tekniken ökar vi både infrastrukturens kapacitet och utvecklingstakten inom digitalisering och processer.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som enhetschef för Arkitekturstyrning har du en nyckelroll i att utveckla och stärka arkitekturarbetet i en samhällskritisk verksamhet. Enheten utgör myndighetens koncernarkitekturfunktion och bidrar till helhet, riktning och samordning genom att utveckla och förvalta gemensamma ramverk, principer och arbetssätt.
   

  

 Inom enheten samlas domänarkitekterna för de IT-nära områdena, såsom IT-infrastruktur, integration och systemutveckling. Du ansvarar för att skapa förutsättningar för en sammanhållen och välfungerande arkitekturutveckling inom dessa domäner, inklusive struktur, prioritering och uppföljning.
   

  

 Uppdraget omfattar även ansvar för samordningen av division IT:s deltagande i internationella samarbeten och forum.
   

  

 Du rapporterar till sektionschefen för Arkitektur- och datastyrning, som även är Svenska kraftnäts chefsarkitekt, och har ett nära och strategiskt samarbete kring utvecklingen och realiseringen av myndighetens arkitektur. I rollen kan du vid behov även komma att agera ställföreträdande chefsarkitekt. Du arbetar även nära enhetschef för Datastyrning och informationsarkitektur för att säkerställa ett effektivt samspel mellan enheterna.
   

  

 Rollen innebär:
   

  

* Verksamhetsansvar för enheten, inklusive personal-, budget- och resultatansvar för cirka 15 medarbetare.
* Sätta mål, riktning och prioriteringar för enhetens arbete samt följa upp leveranser och resultat.
* Leda enhetsarbetet tillsammans med medarbetarna för att skapa en positiv och utvecklande arbetsmiljö.
* Vidareutveckla struktur, ramverk, arbetssätt och mognad inom arkitekturstyrningen.
* Säkerställa att arkitekturprinciper och gemensamma arbetssätt får genomslag i organisationen.
* Ha övergripande ansvar för att division IT:s internationella arbete är samordnat och ändamålsenligt.


 Det här är en roll för dig som vill kombinera strategiskt ledarskap med tydligt leveransansvar och bidra till att arkitekturen blir en möjliggörare för verksamhetens utveckling.
   

  

**Om dig**
**Skallkrav:**
 Vi söker en erfaren ledare med djup förståelse för IT-arkitektur och hur arkitektur bidrar till verksamhetens utveckling. Du har vana av att arbeta i komplexa organisationer och har förmågan att skapa struktur, riktning och engagemang.
   

  

 Arkitekturarbetet bedrivs i nära samverkan med många delar av organisationen och kräver att du kan skapa förtroende, ta tillvara olika perspektiv och bidra till ett konstruktivt samarbete mellan verksamhet, IT och arkitekter. Du har erfarenhet av att leda genom andra ledare eller seniora specialister och är kommunikativ, lyhörd och relationsskapande i ditt ledarskap. För att lyckas i rollen är du även samarbetsorienterad och hänsynstagande.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och ditt ledarskap.
   

  

 Vi strävar efter en jämnare könsfördelning inom IT-divisionen och uppmuntrar därför särskilt kvinnor att söka, men välkomnar självklart alla kvalificerade kandidater.
   

  

 Vidare har du en akademisk examen, exempelvis inom IT, data/informationsvetenskap eller systemutveckling, alternativt motsvarande kompetens som du fått genom arbetslivserfarenhet.
   

  

* Flerårig chefserfarenhet med personal-, budget- och verksamhetsansvar.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av arbete inom IT-arkitektur och/eller Enterprise Architecture.
* Erfarenhet av att leda seniora medarbetare eller arkitekturteam.
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska.


 Det är
 **meriterande** 
 om du har kunskap och erfarenhet av:
   

  

* Att vidareutveckla arkitekturstyrning eller arkitekturfunktioner.
* Arbete i större organisationer med komplexa IT-miljöer.
* Internationell samverkan.
* Vidareutbildning eller certifiering inom arkitektur.
* Vidareutbildning eller certifiering inom chef- och ledarskap.


**Bra att veta**
* Tjänsten är placerad i Sundbyberg
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50 %
* Sista ansökningsdag är den 8 april 2026. Vi använder urvalsfrågor istället för personligt brev och önskar ditt CV skrivet på svenska.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning och provanställning kan eventuellt bli aktuellt.
* Vi tillämpar arbetspsykologiska tester i denna rekrytering.
* Förmåner | Svenska kraftnät


 Vid frågor om tjänsten kontakta gärna Felipe Castillo, rekryterande chef, 010 475 98 17, vid frågor om rekryteringsprocessen kontakta Anna Maria Hedman, ansvarig rekryterare, 010 489 26 71.
   

  

 Fackliga representanter är Annika Ingeborn, SACO, 010 475 87 72 och Erica Midfjäll ST, 010 475 87 31. Du når oss också via e-post: fornamn.efternamn@svk.se
   

  

 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om säkerhetsprövning Svenska kraftnät arbetar för att främja mångfald och motverka diskriminering och ser gärna sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter till våra rekryteringar. Lär känna Svenska kraftnät och hur det är att arbeta hos oss: Lär känna oss på Svenska kraftnät

title: Technical Assessment Specialist
description:
**Location:** 
 Europe (remote)
 



**Language:** 
 English (C1 or higher)
 



  





 At Proxify, we exist to connect the world’s best tech talent with companies that need them. Our vetting process is at the heart of that mission. As we assess tens of thousands of tech talents every month, we’re looking for someone who can ensure the quality of our technical interviews and general assessment of engineering excellence. This role is ideal for experienced engineers who have spent years interviewing, mentoring, and evaluating other engineers—and want to apply that experience systematically and at scale.
 



  





 As an
 **Technical Assessment Specialist** 
 , you will be responsible for ensuring that our vetting and assessment processes are extremely reliable, data-driven, and genuinely predictive of on-the-job performance. This is a highly impactful role at the intersection of engineering, data, and product, with a clear mandate: ensure we consistently select the very best talent at scale.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* **Create new and improve existing vetting plans**
* Identify gaps in our vetting plans and create new tests to validate engineering excellence, direction, velocity and other relevant skills. Tweak existing plans to improve the predictiveness of on-the-job performance.
* **Own the quality of our technical vetting**
* Take responsibility for evaluating how well our technical assessment processes measure engineering excellence across different roles and seniority levels.
* **Use data to validate reliability and accuracy**
* Perform quantitative analyses to understand what each assessment step measures, how accurately it does so, and how well outcomes correlate with real engagement performance. Apply strong statistical, probabilistic, and analytical reasoning to answer hard questions about signal vs. noise.
* **Design and track meaningful metrics**
* Define clear, quantitative success metrics for vetting quality and continuously monitor them at scale using data from our ATS and downstream performance signals.
* **Bring in external expertise**
* Identify and collaborate with external experts to qualitatively evaluate our assessment content, structure, and standards.
* **Drive change with clarity and confidence**
* Lead improvements to existing vetting processes through structured change management, setting clear goals, validating impact with data, and aligning stakeholders across engineering, talent, and product.
* **Build for scale and systemisation**
* Ensure our assessment framework remains robust, consistent, and scalable while handling ~15,000 candidates per month
* **Partner cross-functionally**
* Work closely with other Operations leaders, RnD leaders and the Commercial organisation to evolve assessments in line with real-world engineering needs and client expectations.



  





**What we're looking for** 




  




* A
 **strong technical background** 
 , with a deep hands-on understanding of software engineering and how excellence should be assessed in practice (across backend, frontend, full-stack, AI, QA, and related roles).
* Proven experience with creating processes for
 **assessing technical talent** 
 at scale.
* **Excellent data, statistics, and probability skills** 
 , with the ability to reason rigorously about measurement reliability, bias, and predictive power.
* Experience designing or improving
 **structured assessment systems** 
 , frameworks, or evaluation processes.
* Hands-on experience using
 **SQL for data analysis** 
 , and comfort working directly with large datasets.
* Background in
 **engineering leadership roles** 
 such as Tech Lead, Engineering Manager, or similar is a strong plus.
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical and statistical concepts clearly to non-experts.
* C1-level English proficiency or higher.
* Based in Europe.



  





**Why you’ll love this opportunity at Proxify:** 




  





 ❤️ Be part of a humble, supportive and tech-savvy team
 



 🚀 Great opportunities for professional development and personal growth
 



 🌍 Be part of a global team across 39+ countries
 



 🤝 High ownership, high impact: your decisions move the needle
 



  





**At Proxify, we believe that great hiring shapes the future.** 




 With the right people, anything is possible. Are you one of them?
 



 We look forward to meeting you 🚀
 



  





*Please submit your application / CV in English.*

title: ERP Architect
description:
**Vill du jobba med varierande uppdrag jämsides med de allra mest erfarna inom affärs- och IT transformationer?** 




  





 Midagon är en nordisk, oberoende verksamhets- och IT-konsultbolag specialiserad på att genomföra utmanande transformationsprojekt och program. Vi är över 230 anställda i Norden, varav närmare 100 befinner sig i Sverige. Vi driver uppdrag i både privat och offentlig sektor, åt globala aktörer såväl som nationella företag. Våra uppdrag varierar i storlek, men gemensamt är att vi hjälper våra kunder att lyckas med sina komplexa transformationer, där vi kan stoltsera med långa kundrelationer samt flertalet egna ramavtal.
 



  





 Våra erfarna konsulter har fokus på digitala transformationer med bland annat inriktning på verksamhetsutveckling, projekt- & programledning eller specialkompetens inom specifika ämnesområden. Hos oss hittar du de bästa av de bästa. Ett ypperligt kvitto på detta är våra utmärkelser såsom Sveriges nöjdaste kunder (Radar) och 9 års certifiering av ”Great place to work”.
 



  





 Vill du också vara del av ett team av seniora konsulter, där avslappnad atmosfär går hand i hand med ett engagerat arbete och sund livsbalans?
 



  





**Din roll** 




 I denna roll blir du en nyckelposition i komplexa transformationsprojekt där du ansvarar för att definiera och designa ERP-lösningar i nära samarbete med kundens verksamhet, IT och andra intressenter. Du säkerställer att lösningsarkitekturen är affärsdriven, skalbar och långsiktigt hållbar mot verksamhetens affärsmål – från tidig förstudie till design, implementation och förvaltning. Med din tekniska och affärsmässiga förståelse fungerar du som en strategisk rådgivare och brygga mellan teknik och verksamhets krav.
 



  





 Internt på Midagon blir du en del av ett seniort team med djup kompetens inom ERP, verksamhetsutveckling och digital transformation. Du samarbetar med projektledare, verksamhetsarkitekter och andra specialister i en miljö präglad av kunskapsutbyte, kvalitet och långsiktiga kundrelationer.
 



  





**Den vi söker** 



* Har gedigen erfarenhet som lösningsarkitekt eller Tech lead inom ERP och arbetat verksamhetsnära .
* Har arbetat med flera större ERP-system som SAP, M3, IFS eller Dynamics .
* Förstår samspelet mellan verksamhetsprocesser och systemarkitektur samt arbetat med eller nära verksamhetsarkitekturen.
* Är van att arbeta i större transformationsprogram eller implementeringsprojekt.
* Kommunicerar obehindrat på både svenska och engelska



  





 För att trivas hos oss krävs ett analytiskt tänkesätt, nyfikenhet och en förmåga att översätta komplexa behov till robusta lösningsförslag. Du är prestigelös, strukturerad och van vid att arbeta nära både tekniska team och affärsverksamheten.
 



  





**Är du nyfiken?** 




 Läs gärna mer om oss och Våra tidigare uppdrag, på hemsidan kan du också enkelt registrerar din ansökan. Har du ytterligare frågor eller funderingar, tveka inte att kontakta Martin Nilsson inom HR-& rekrytering på martin.nilsson@midagon.com / 070-2257833.
 



  





 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: DevOps Arkitekt - AWS
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Din roll**
 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens molnlösningar?
   

  

 Du blir en del av Capgeminis Cloud & Infrastructure Services (CIS)-enhet med fokus på projekt- och konsulttjänster i Norden. Vårt mål är att erbjuda kunder helhetslösningar inom Cloud och vi erbjuder en mängd olika tjänster till våra kunder, från strategisk rådgivning till projektgenomförande.
   

  

 Du kommer att ha en nyckelroll i att:
   

  

* Samla in krav för att förstå vår kunds verksamhet och sedan föreslå skräddarsydda lösningar
* Tillhandahålla teknisk vägledning och felsökningsstöd under hela projektleveransen
* Utforma och implementera komplexa, skalbara och säkra AWS-lösningar anpassade efter kundens behov.
* Hålla dig ajour med industritrender och moderna teknologier


**Din profil**
* 7+ års erfarenhet av molnarkitektur och implementering
* 5+ års praktisk erfarenhet av skriptspråk (PowerShell, Python), design, automatisering och optimering av infrastruktur för provisionering, konfigurationshantering och distributionsprocesser med hjälp av Infrastructure as Code (IaC)-verktyg (Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible).
* Bygga och underhålla CI/CD-pipelines med verktyg som Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, AWS CodePipeline och CodeDeploy, samt erfarenhet av versionshantering i källkodsförråd (Git, SVN, Mercurial, Perforce).
* Containerisera applikationer med Docker och hantera containerorkestreringsplattformar som Kubernetes (EKS) eller AWS Elastic Container Service (ECS) eller Argo CD.
* Erfarenhet av AWS, med kompetens inom ett brett utbud av AWS-tjänster (t.ex. EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, IAM, VPC, CloudFormation)
* Flytande i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Önskvärda kunskaper:
   

  

* AWS-certifieringar på professionell nivå (t.ex. Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional) är meriterande
* Erfarenhet av automatisering och skriptning (t.ex. Terraform, Python) samt kunskap om säkerhets- och regelefterlevnadsstandarder (t.ex. HIPAA, GDPR)
* Stark kommunikationsförmåga med förmåga att förklara tekniska koncept för både tekniska och icke-tekniska målgrupper


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas:**
* Intressanta projekt hos kunder på enterprisenivå i en global kontext
* Förmånlig tjänstepension och kollektivavtal som ger trygghet
* Fokus på din hälsa och ditt välmående, med initiativ för att skapa balans mellan jobb och fritid
* Brett utbud av karriärmöjligheter och tillgång till Capgeminis stora utbildningskatalog, särskilt inom den senaste teknologin för t.ex. cloud och generativ AI
* En företagskultur där mångfald och inkludering värdesätts högt


**Ansökan**
*I denna rekrytering hanterar vi ansökningar löpande. Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov. Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Jessica Fogelsjöö, Jessica.fogelsjoo@capgemini.com.*
 Till denna roll söker vi medarbetare för säkerhetsklassat uppdrag placerad hos kund.
   

  

 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Senior Java Solution Developer building SEB Kort Groups new operational MDM | SEB, Solna
description:
Ready to shape the future of financial services? As a Senior Solution Developer, you’ll be part driving the creation of our new operational Master Data Management, powering innovation and collaboration in a progressive tech environment.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Senior Solution Developer for Master Data Management (MDM), you’ll transform architectural blueprints into high-quality services and data pipelines. This includes building core MDM components, developing microservices, modern APIs, and implementing event-driven integrations using Kafka. You’ll ensure reliable data mastering, transformation, and distribution flows, while using CI/CD-pipelines to increase code quality, and operational excellence. Collaborating closely with architects and product teams, you will deliver a scalable, secure, and compliant MDM platform.
   

  

 To thrive in this role, we believe you have
   

  

* Proven skills in microservices and API development, using Java Spring Boot, Kotlin, or similar languages, alongside automated testing and CI/CD.
* Hands-on experience with Apache Kafka for event-driven integrations and streaming pipelines.
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), container tools (Kubernetes, Docker, or OpenShift) and observability tools (Splunk).
* Working experiences with modeling and developing complex schemas (PostgreSQL).


 And it would be very beneficial if you also have
   

  

* Strong experience in Master Data Management (MDM) with expertise in data mastering, modeling, and quality.
* Experience with Apache Spark.
* A proactive, structured, high-quality engineering mindset and a collaborative spirit in agile development.


 What we offer
   

  

* Be part of starting something new that will shape the future of SEB Kort Group.
* An open and supportive culture, with a flat hierarchy and genuine willingness to share ideas, opinions, and perspectives.
* Extensive training and learning opportunities.
* Stability and long-term commitment as part of one of Sweden’s most established financial groups.
* Remote working possibilities and flexible work schedule.
* Modern office environments, with subsidized lunches in our two cantinas, an in-house gym, and access to group training classes.
* Attractive employee benefits, including favorable mortgage rates for SEB employees.


 Do you want to be part of SEB?
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial to our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than
 **5th of April 2026** 
 . If you have questions about the position, please contact Jonathan Berglund, jonathan.berglund@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts:
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Marketing Analytics Manager
description:
Svea Solar is a leading force in the energy and solar industry, where innovation and market driven growth define our business. Our Marketing team is not just a support function - it is at the center of our commercial strategy, directly influencing revenue, profitability, and our long term vision.
   

  

 We are now looking for an experienced Marketing Analytics Manager to become a strategic and senior partner to our CMO and play a key role in shaping the future direction of the company.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will work closely with our CMO, Sofia Brandberg, and take full and proactive ownership of delivering datadriven insights and strategic recommendations to the Marketing team, the broader Commercial organisation, the website team and C-level leadership.
   

  

**Your Mission**
* Lead the way in simplifying analytics and turning insights into clear, actionable recommendations - enabling stakeholders to focus, move faster, and unlock greater impact.
* Own the end‑to‑end analysis of the full marketing funnel - from market interest and traffic acquisition across paid and organic channels, through on‑site behavior and conversion performance.
* Proactively analyze and advise on lead channels and overall lead mix - mapping lead needs and optimization, campaign performance and opportunities to optimize channel allocation for stronger ROI.
* Act as the go‑to partner for marketing and website stakeholders (CRM, content, website, media) empowering data‑driven decision making by ensuring access to the right insights, enabling goal‑setting, analysis and AB-testing that drives both efficiency and growth.
* Build intuitive, scalable dashboards that democratize insights across the organization - making data accessible, actionable, and a natural part of everyday decision making
* Partner with IT, Tech and Finance to ensure high data quality and maintain a reliable single source of truth across all marketing data assets.


 🌍 Life as a Power Shifter - What do we offer you
   

  

**The opportunity to make an impact** 
 – your work directly contributes to fixing the planet and driving the energy transition.
   

  

**About**
**A value-driven workplace** 
 – read more about our values here.
   

  

**The chance to own your results** 
 – grow, take responsibility, and power up as both we and the energy industry evolve.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusivity** 
 – different perspectives drive innovation. Here, you can be yourself and contribute with your experiences, identities, and ideas.
   

  

**Employment benefits** 
 – occupational pension, 30 days of vacation, wellness allowance, free parking, and more.
   

  

**Flexibility / hybrid work** 
 – work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

 Want to see what life at Svea Solar really looks like? Follow us on Instagram: @LifeAtSveaSolar
   

  

 Are we a match?
   

  

**We Are Looking For Someone Who**
* Brings strong experience in Marketing Analytics, BI, and ROI-driven performance analysis, ideally with a focus on acquisition and activation. A commercial mindset is essential!
* Demonstrates strong end-to-end ownership, from identifying the most impactful analyses to performing the analysis and packaging insights into clear, visual recommendations. The rest of the team will bring your recommendations to life.
* Is passionate about empowering others through clear, visual insights. You are a true advocate for simplicity, dashboards, and data storytelling, always eager to share your expertise and highlight the opportunities you uncover.
* Is comfortable working with large, complex datasets and creating clear, visual presentations for C-level stakeholders.
* Demonstrates strong proficiency in data analysis using Excel.
* Has experience working with Meta, Google Ads, Google Analytics, tracking (including Google Tag Manager), marketing automation, and CRM platforms.
* Holds an academic background in economics, finance, engineering, or a related field.
* Has an excellent command of English.


**As a Person, You Are**
* A self-driven, strategic thinker who thrives in a fast-paced and constantly evolving environment.


**Nice To Have (but Not Required)**
* Experience with Power BI and Funnel and proficiency in Swedish.


 ⚡Who are we
   

  

 As Sweden’s - and one of Europe’s - leading providers of energy tech and solar, we help our customers optimize their energy use with smart, connected solutions. From solar panels to heat pumps, batteries, EV chargers, and software, we’re shaping the future of energy. We call it
 **The Power Shift** 
 . And the ones driving it?
 **Power Shifters** 
 .
   

  

  

  

**About Our Recruitment Process**
* With structured interviews and assessments through Alva Labs, we make sure our recruitment process is fair, inclusive, and unbiased - because diversity is key to innovation!
* Read more about our Recruitment process here.


 👉
 **Ready to become a Power Shifter?** 
 We review applications on a rolling basis, so don’t wait to send yours in!

title: Quantitative Risk Analyst, LGD Models [Regular/Senior]
description:
**Job ID: 2606**
**Quantitative Risk Analyst, LGD Models [Regular/Senior] (permanent position)**
 Do you want to play an important role in one of the largest model development programmes in Nordics? We are now looking for (Senior) Quantitative Risk Analyst to develop LGD models in Nordea. This opportunity is an exciting mix of challenges such as developing statistical models, designing internal software libraries, working with big data, analysing economic behaviour, understanding and abiding to regulatory constraints.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Meet the LGD Models team in Risk Models Methodology & IRB Models. Our team is a part of one of the most important programs, which consists in upscaling Nordea’s internal models for the credit risk. The primary focus of this role is to develop LGD models, but there would be opportunities to work with other IRB parameters. As (Senior) Quantitative Risk Analyst you will develop your skills within advanced modelling – a field which is in high focus in Nordea.
   

  

 Being a part of the broader Group Risk organization, you'll help ensure that compliance underpins every decision we make and every action we take. By bringing your perspectives to the team and through your focus on quality and cooperation, you will be important.
   

  

 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
**Main responsibilities in this role:**
* Develop, test and maintain LGD models
* Develop tools for data extraction for model development and other analysis
* Continuously work on improving methodological choices for the models and be able to clearly communicate its rationale and impact to internal and external stakeholders
* Join an open and inspiring atmosphere, where you will cooperate closely with your colleagues across the bank
* Give input to senior management and business based on data analysis and previous experience


 You will join a highly professional and dedicated team of analysts with diverse background and with excellent opportunities for personal and professional development.
   

  

**Who You Are**
**This is the right role for you if you:**
* Enjoy learning and are excited about bringing your ideas to the table;
* Take the ownership of the task, but enjoying collaboration with others;
* Have good communication skills to manage stakeholder interaction efficiently across the value chain.


**Your background and skills include:**
* Advanced degree in a quantitative field, including but not limited to economics, statistics, physics, mathematics, data science, or similar
* Experience in IRB modelling, especially in risk quantification
* Knowledge of SQL, Python, SAS or similar
* Understanding of statistical and machine learning methods
* Experience in working with data and models


**It would be ideal if you also have:**
* Experience in driving deliveries with the tight deadlines
* Knowledge of credit risk processes and bank products
* Understanding of technologies and IT solutions used for data processing


**What We Offer**
**People** 
 come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model** 
 – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 31/03/2026.
   

  

**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships.** 
 We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change.** 
 We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea.** 
 We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Finland:** 
 A security clearance will be performed for the person selected for this position.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact Finansförbundet at finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACO at SacoNordea@nordea.com.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Poland:** 
 Please include permit for processing personal data in CV as following:
   

  

 In accordance with art. 6 (1) a and b. Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data, and repealing Directive 95/46/EC (General Data Protection Regulation) hereinafter ‘GDPR’. I agree to have: my personal data, education and employment history proceeded for the purposes of current and future recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp.
   

  

 The administrator of your personal data is: Nordea Bank Abp operating in Poland through its Branch, address: Aleja Edwarda Rydza Śmiglego 20, 93-281 Łodź. Your personal data will be processed for the recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp. You have a right to access your personal data, right to rectify and right to delete. Disclosing the personal data in the scope specified by the provisions of Polish Labour Code from 26 June 1974 and executive acts are mandatory. Providing personal data is necessary to conduct the recruitment processes. The request for the deletion of your personal data means resignation from further participation in recruitment processes and causes the immediate removal of your application. Detailed information concerning processing of your personal data can be found at: https://www.nordea.com/en/doc/nordea-privacy-policy-for-applicants.pdf
